meta.title: Opten — AI Prompt Scorer
hero.title: Stop wasting credits on bad prompts
hero.subtitle1: Opten evaluates your prompt for the specific AI model, shows what's wrong, and fixes it in one click.
partners.label: After installing, use it on these sites:
steps.01.title: Write your prompt as usual
steps.01.desc: Opten embeds directly into the generator interface. No copy-pasting to other windows.
steps.02.desc: A color ring, specific recommendations, and a diagnosis: what's wrong and why. For your specific model, not just "in general".
steps.03.desc: "Enhance" rewrites the prompt following all rules of the chosen AI model. Paste and generate.
features.card1.title: 43 models. Each with its own rules.
features.card1.desc: Midjourney loves short metaphors. Flux requires technical parameters. DALL·E wants detailed descriptions. Opten knows the rules of every model — and checks your prompt against them, not "in general".
features.card2.title: Works where you generate
features.card2.desc:
No need to switch tabs or copy text.
Opten appears right inside your generator interface — like Grammarly appears in Gmail.
features.card3.title: Every bad prompt burns your credits
features.card3.desc: Opten users save 30%–50% of generation credits. With an average spend of $20–50/mo on generators, Opten pays for itself in the first hour of use.
features.card4.title: Prompt improvement in one click
features.card4.desc:
"Enhance" rewrites the prompt in 2 seconds.
It considers style, technical parameters, model constraints, and your original intent.
privacy.item1.title: We don't store prompts
privacy.item1.desc: The extension analyzes text locally and via a secure API channel. Your prompts and images are never saved on our servers.
privacy.item2.title: We don't sell or share data
privacy.item2.desc: We don't sell user content, use it for advertising, or provide it to third parties for model training.
privacy.item3.title: Minimal permissions
privacy.item3.desc: Opten requests only the browser permissions necessary for operation. No access to your history, bookmarks, or other tabs.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body:
This document is a public offer (hereinafter — "Offer") by Individual Entrepreneur Vladislav Pavlovich Voronezhtcev (hereinafter — "Service Provider") and contains all essential terms for providing access to the Opten service (hereinafter — "Service").

In accordance with Article 437 of the Civil Code of the Russian Federation, this document constitutes a public offer. Acceptance of the offer is the performance of actions specified in clause 2.2.

1. Terms and Definitions

  • Service — the "Opten" software distributed as a Google Chrome browser extension, designed to analyze and improve prompts for AI image generators.
  • Service Provider — Individual Entrepreneur Vladislav Pavlovich Voronezhtcev, TIN 723016676391.
  • Customer (User) — an individual who has accepted the terms of this Offer.
  • Subscription — paid access to the extended functionality of the Service ("Pro" plan).
  • Billing Period — 30 (thirty) calendar days from the activation or renewal of the subscription.

2. Subject of the Offer

2.1. The Service Provider undertakes to provide the Customer with access to the Service functions in accordance with the selected pricing plan, and the Customer undertakes to pay for the services in the manner and on the terms provided by this Offer.

2.2. Acceptance of this Offer is any of the following actions:

  • Installing the Opten extension from the Chrome Web Store
  • Registering an account in the Service
  • Paying for a subscription

2.3. The date of the agreement is the date of acceptance.

3. Pricing Plans and Costs

3.1. Free Plan

  • 10 prompt checks per month
  • Scoring for all supported models (43+)
  • Color quality scale and text recommendations
  • Cost: 0 ₽

3.2. "Pro" Plan

  • 300 prompt checks per month
  • One-click prompt improvement (Auto-enhance)
  • Priority analysis speed
  • Early access to new models
  • Telegram support
  • Cost: 199 (One hundred ninety-nine) rubles per month

3.3. The Service Provider may change pricing, notifying the Customer no less than 14 calendar days before the changes take effect. Price changes do not affect the current paid period.

4. Payment Procedure

4.1. Payment is made by non-cash transfer using a bank card via the YooKassa payment service (NCO "YuMoney", Bank of Russia license).

4.2. The subscription renews automatically every 30 calendar days. Charges are made on the date corresponding to the first payment day.

4.3. The Customer may cancel automatic subscription renewal at any time via the extension interface (popup → "Cancel subscription"). Upon cancellation, access to "Pro" plan features is retained until the end of the current paid period.

4.4. If the automatic renewal charge fails, access to the "Pro" plan ends and the Customer is moved to the free plan.

5. Service Provision

5.1. Access to the Service is provided 24/7, 7 days a week. The Service Provider makes reasonable efforts to ensure uninterrupted operation but does not guarantee the absence of technical maintenance windows.

5.2. The Service Provider may temporarily suspend the Service for maintenance, notifying the Customer when possible.

5.3. Prompt analysis results are advisory in nature. The Service Provider does not guarantee specific image generation results.

6. Rights and Obligations

6.1. The Service Provider undertakes to:

  • Provide access to Service functionality in accordance with the selected plan
  • Ensure personal data protection in accordance with the Privacy Policy
  • Notify the Customer of significant changes in service terms

6.2. The Service Provider is entitled to:

  • Change Service functionality without prior notice
  • Suspend or terminate Customer access in case of violation of this Offer
  • Set usage limits for each pricing plan

6.3. The Customer undertakes to:

  • Not use the Service for purposes contrary to Russian Federation law
  • Not attempt to circumvent the Service's technical limitations
  • Not distribute harmful content through the Service
  • Provide accurate data during registration

7. Limitation of Liability

7.1. The Service is provided "as is". The Service Provider is not responsible for the Service's conformity to the Customer's specific goals and expectations.

7.2. The Service Provider is not responsible for losses arising from the use or inability to use the Service, including lost profits.

7.3. The aggregate liability of the Service Provider is limited to the amount paid by the Customer for the current billing period.

8. Intellectual Property

8.1. All rights to the Service, including source code, design, logos, and documentation, belong to the Service Provider.

8.2. The Customer receives a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Service in accordance with its functional purpose.

9. Term and Termination

9.1. The agreement is effective from the date of acceptance until terminated by either party.

9.2. The Customer may terminate the agreement at any time by cancelling the subscription and deleting the extension. Refunds are made in accordance with the Refund Policy.

9.3. The Service Provider may unilaterally terminate the agreement in case of the Customer's violation of this Offer, notifying the Customer by email.

10. Dispute Resolution

10.1. All disputes are resolved through negotiation. A pre-trial claims procedure is mandatory, with a 15 business day review period.

10.2. If a dispute cannot be resolved through negotiation, it shall be submitted to the court at the Service Provider's location in accordance with Russian Federation law.

11. Service Provider Details

Individual Entrepreneur Vladislav Pavlovich Voronezhtcev
TIN: 723016676391
Address: 625062, Tyumen, Dmitry Mendeleev St., 2, bldg. 1, apt. 148
Bank: Yekaterinburg Branch of Alfa-Bank JSC
Account: 40802810638390002456
Correspondent account: 30101810100000000964
BIC: 046577964
E-mail: zignifer@gmail.com
Phone: +7 (929) 262-11-17
Website: opten.space
privacy.body:
1. General Provisions

This Privacy Policy (hereinafter — "Policy") defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of users of the Opten service (hereinafter — "Service"), provided by Individual Entrepreneur Vladislav Pavlovich Voronezhtcev (hereinafter — "Operator").

TIN: 723016676391
Address: 625062, Tyumen, Dmitry Mendeleev St., 2, bldg. 1, apt. 148
E-mail: zignifer@gmail.com
Phone: +7 (929) 262-11-17

By using the Service, the User agrees to the terms of this Policy. If the User disagrees with the Policy, they must cease using the Service.

2. Data We Collect

2.1. Data provided by the User

  • Email address — upon registration and authentication in the Service
  • Payment data — when subscribing (processed by YooKassa payment provider; the Operator does not store bank card data)

2.2. Data collected automatically

  • User identifier (UUID) — for tracking usage limits
  • Number of checks used — for monitoring plan limits
  • Browser type and version — for compatibility

2.3. Data we do NOT collect

  • Prompt texts — not stored on the Operator's servers. Prompts are transmitted directly via a secure API channel for analysis and are not logged.
  • Generated images — not uploaded or processed by the Service
  • Browser history, bookmarks, data from other tabs
  • Geolocation data

3. Purposes of Data Processing

The Operator processes personal data exclusively for the following purposes:

  • Providing access to the Service and its features
  • User identification and usage limit tracking
  • Payment processing and subscription management
  • Sending service notifications (about subscription status, Service changes)
  • Improving Service quality
  • Fulfilling obligations under the terms of service agreement

4. Legal Basis for Processing

Data processing is carried out on the following grounds:

  • User consent (Art. 6 Part 1 Clause 1 of Federal Law No. 152 "On Personal Data")
  • Performance of a contract to which the data subject is a party (Art. 6 Part 1 Clause 5 of Federal Law No. 152)

5. Data Transfer to Third Parties

The Operator does not sell, rent, or transfer personal data to third parties, except:

  • YooKassa (NCO "YuMoney") — for payment processing. YooKassa is a certified payment data operator and processes card data in accordance with PCI DSS standards.
  • Supabase Inc. — for storing accounts and subscription data. Data is stored on servers in Europe.
  • Anthropic, PBC — for analyzing prompts via API. Prompts are transmitted in real time and are not retained by the provider per API terms.
  • By legal requirement — in cases provided by Russian Federation law.

6. Data Storage and Protection

Personal data is stored for the entire duration of the user's account. Upon account deletion, data is deleted within 30 calendar days.

The Operator takes necessary organizational and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorized or accidental access, destruction, modification, blocking, copying, distribution, and other unlawful actions.

Security measures include:

  • Data encryption in transit (TLS/HTTPS)
  • Authentication via secure tokens (JWT)
  • Access control to data
  • Regular security audits

7. User Rights

The User has the right to:

  • Receive information about their personal data processed by the Operator
  • Request clarification, blocking, or deletion of their data
  • Withdraw consent to personal data processing
  • Delete their account and all associated data

To exercise these rights, send a request to zignifer@gmail.com. The request will be processed within 10 business days.

8. Cookies

The opten.space website does not use cookies to track users. The Opten extension uses browser storage (chrome.storage) exclusively for storing user settings and authentication data.

9. Policy Changes

The Operator may make changes to this Policy. The current version is available at opten.space/privacy. Continued use of the Service after changes are made indicates the User's agreement with the updated Policy.

10. Contact Information

For questions about personal data processing, contact:
Individual Entrepreneur Vladislav Pavlovich Voronezhtcev
E-mail: zignifer@gmail.com
Phone: +7 (929) 262-11-17
refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.body:
This Refund Policy (hereinafter — "Policy") defines the terms and procedure for refunding payments for a subscription to the Opten service (hereinafter — "Service"), provided by Individual Entrepreneur Vladislav Pavlovich Voronezhtcev (hereinafter — "Service Provider").

1. Subscription Cancellation

1.1. The Customer may cancel the "Pro" plan subscription at any time via the Opten extension interface (popup → "Cancel subscription" button).

1.2. Upon cancellation:

  • Automatic renewal stops
  • Access to "Pro" plan features is retained until the end of the current paid period (30 days from the last payment)
  • At the end of the paid period, the Customer is automatically moved to the free plan

1.3. Subscription cancellation is not grounds for a refund for the current paid period.

2. Refund Conditions

2.1. Refunds are possible in the following cases:

2.1.1. Refund within 3 days of payment

If no more than 3 (three) calendar days have passed since payment and the Customer has not used any paid Service features (0 checks used in the paid period), a full refund is made.

2.1.2. Technical issues

If the Service was unavailable for more than 72 consecutive hours during the paid period due to the Service Provider's fault, the Customer may request a refund proportional to the unavailability period or an extension of the subscription for an equivalent period.

2.1.3. Erroneous charge

In the event of a double charge or other erroneous payment, the excess amount is refunded in full.

3. Cases Where Refunds Are Not Issued

Refunds are not issued in the following cases:

  • The Customer used paid Service features and more than 3 days have passed since payment
  • The Customer violated the terms of service agreement, resulting in account blocking
  • Service unavailability was caused by force majeure circumstances
  • Dissatisfaction with the quality of prompt recommendations (analysis results are advisory in nature)

4. Refund Request Procedure

4.1. To request a refund, send a request to zignifer@gmail.com with the subject "Refund request" and provide:

  • Email used for Service registration
  • Date and amount of payment
  • Reason for refund request

4.2. The request is reviewed within 5 business days of receipt.

4.3. If approved, the refund is made to the bank card used for payment within 5–10 business days (timing depends on the card-issuing bank).

5. Contact Information

For refund inquiries, contact:
Individual Entrepreneur Vladislav Pavlovich Voronezhtcev
E-mail: zignifer@gmail.com
Phone: +7 (929) 262-11-17
Processing hours: Mon–Fri, 10:00–18:00 (UTC+5)
